before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"fk1bo","text":"This protocol assumes that the original urine samples have \u003e600 µL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"b31ck","text":"1. Chemicals and reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2jpcq","text":"Phosphate buffer in D2O (1.5 M, pH 7.4, 1.11 mM DSS-d6)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"965mc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1rrua","text":"2. Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9n3hm","text":"Calibrated micropipettes (100 μL, 200 μL, and 1000 μL)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3hdul","text":"Pippette tips","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2r490","text":"1.5-mL Eppendorf tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"353nj","text":"5-mm SampleJet NMR tubes from Bruker","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"buntk","text":"Centrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a3sen","text":"Vortex mixer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3up5a","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6lm92","text":"3. Study samples","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ak2b7","text":"Urine samples","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 600 µL of 100% cold methanol to 300 µL of samples On ice Use 1.5-mL tubes
Centrifuge the samples at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:30:00
Transfer the supernatant of each sample to a new tube Use 1.5-mL tubes
Dry the samples in a speed-vac concentrator Overnight, (time varies depending on the sample condition) Store dried samples at -80 °C until the following step if needed.
Thaw samples On ice or at 4 °C
Thaw samples On ice or at 4 °C
Centrifuge the samples at 4 °C at 12000 x g, °C, for 00:05:00, min This step is to remove particles in the samples Sample tube and volume specifications vary depending on the study
Add 60 µL of the phosphate buffer to 540 µL of the supernatant for each sample Use 1.5-mL Eppendorf tubes
Transfer 590 µL of the supernatant to an NMR tube for each sample No stickers/labels on the caps and tubes allowed
Dry the samples in a speed-vac concentrator Overnight, (time varies depending on the sample condition)
Centrifuge the samples at 4 °C for 00:00:10 This step is to remove samples attached to tube caps, and no centrifugation speed specified
creator: NAN-KB UGA
